cards.front: What is the main function of the Transport Layer?
cards.back: To provide reliable data transfer between devices on different networks

cards.front: Which protocol is used for connection-oriented service?
What is the main function of the Transport Layer's segmentation process?
cards.back: To divide data into smaller packets for efficient transmission over networks

cards.front: Which protocol is used for connectionless service?
What is the purpose of the checksum in the TCP header?
cards.back: To detect errors in data transmission by verifying the integrity of the received packets
